# Auto-generated rule: agents/*.md description frontmatter must be inline string, not YAML block scalar (>)

validate-plugin Check 11 explicitly rejects YAML block scalars in agent description fields. A multi-line description using > or | will fail validation: "description must be an inline string, not a YAML block scalar (got: ...)". Inline form (description: Long text on one line.) is required. Caught in W4 Q1 Full Gate for agents/dialectic-deriver.md when I1 used the block-scalar form. Workaround for long descriptions: just write a single long line — JSON schema allows it.

## Evidence
2026-05-23 deep-2 W4 Q1: validate-plugin reported "FAIL: dialectic-deriver.md: description must be an inline string, not a YAML block scalar (got: '>)" which cascaded into 15 test failures across persona-reviewers + orchestrators-e2e + check-agents + sandbox-tier + validate-plugin + ux-evaluator-frontmatter test suites (all of which run validate-plugin against the real repo). Fix: rewrite as inline string. Re-run: 101/0.
